raw_entries.text: Match ends, Portugal 1, Congo DR 1.
Second Half ends, Portugal 1, Congo DR 1.
Corner, Portugal. Conceded by Joris Kayembe.
Attempt missed. Cristiano Ronaldo (Portugal) with an attempt from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Bruno Fernandes with a cross.
Yoane Wissa (Congo DR) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Foul by Tomás Araújo (Portugal).
Tomás Araújo (Portugal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Attempt missed. Bruno Fernandes (Portugal) left footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Tomás Araújo.
Fourth official has announced 5 minutes of added time.
Foul by Nélson Semedo (Portugal).
Nélson Semedo (Portugal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Congo DR. Gédéon Kalulu replaces Aaron Wan-Bissaka.
Substitution, Congo DR. Simon Banza replaces Cédric Bakambu.
Joris Kayembe (Congo DR) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Francisco Conceição (Portugal).
Substitution, Portugal. Gonçalo Ramos replaces Vitinha.
Offside, Portugal. Francisco Conceição is caught offside.
Attempt blocked. Francisco Conceição (Portugal) left footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Rafael Leão with a cross.
Cédric Bakambu (Congo DR) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Renato Veiga (Portugal).
Corner, Portugal. Conceded by Samuel Moutoussamy.
Attempt missed. Cédric Bakambu (Congo DR) right footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Noah Sadiki following a fast break.
Attempt missed. Cristiano Ronaldo (Portugal) right footed shot from the centre of the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Francisco Conceição.
Substitution, Congo DR. Charles Pickel replaces Edo Kayembe.
Substitution, Congo DR. Joris Kayembe replaces Arthur Masuaku.
Substitution, Portugal. Nélson Semedo replaces Nuno Mendes.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Portugal. Rafael Leão replaces Pedro Neto.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Foul by Edo Kayembe (Congo DR).
Nuno Mendes (Portugal) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Foul by Samuel Moutoussamy (Congo DR).
Edo Kayembe (Congo DR) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Bruno Fernandes (Portugal).
Attempt missed. Steve Kapuadi (Congo DR) header from the centre of the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Cédric Bakambu with a headed pass.
Corner, Portugal. Conceded by Steve Kapuadi.
Foul by Aaron Wan-Bissaka (Congo DR).
Nuno Mendes (Portugal) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Cédric Bakambu (Congo DR).

Corner, Portugal. Conceded by Lionel Mpasi.
Offside, Congo DR. Cédric Bakambu is caught offside.
Yoane Wissa (Congo DR) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Vitinha (Portugal).
Bruno Fernandes (Portugal) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Second Half begins Portugal 1, Congo DR 1.
Substitution, Portugal. Francisco Conceição replaces Bernardo Silva.
First Half ends, Portugal 1, Congo DR 1.
Goal! Portugal 1, Congo DR 1. Yoane Wissa (Congo DR) header from very close range to the top left corner. Assisted by Arthur Masuaku with a cross following a corner.
Corner, Congo DR. Conceded by Bruno Fernandes.
Attempt blocked. Samuel Moutoussamy (Congo DR) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Arthur Masuaku.
Corner, Congo DR. Conceded by Vitinha.
Attempt blocked. Samuel Moutoussamy (Congo DR) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Chancel Mbemba.

Handball by Yoane Wissa (Congo DR).

Foul by João Cancelo (Portugal).
Attempt blocked. Bruno Fernandes (Portugal) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by João Neves.
João Neves (Portugal) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Attempt saved. Edo Kayembe (Congo DR) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the top right corner by Diogo Costa (Portugal). Assisted by Steve Kapuadi.

Pedro Neto (Portugal) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Chancel Mbemba (Congo DR) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
